_README: Example manifest for the CV input-quality corpus. The real corpus dir data/eval-cvs-pdf/ is
GITIGNORED (PII/PDPL). To use: 1) drop real CV *.pdf files into data/eval-cvs-pdf/, 2) copy this
file to data/eval-cvs-pdf/manifest.json and edit `files` to match your filenames, 3) run
Both read the SAME manifest. Target coverage: layout x lang = {single_column, two_column, canva,
scanned} x {vi, en}. The harness ALWAYS prints a thin-corpus disclaimer + lists missing coverage.
PII: never commit the PDFs or the generated *-report.json; only metrics/section-names/lang persist.
layout: single_column | two_column | canva | scanned | unknown
